label: Transparent dill motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Dill transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create a complete dill herb motif isolated for transparent-background extraction.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for background removal.
Subject: airy dill umbel with fine yellow-green seed clusters, feathery blue-green fronds, thin branching herb stems, a small hint of herb-bed growth at the base; crisp botanical detail and graceful open negative space.
Composition: centered vertical cutout, full subject visible, generous padding, crisp edges, no crop.
Lighting/material: clean natural botanical illustration/photo hybrid, matte organic surfaces, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.
Color constraints: use only dill-derived greens, yellow seed tones, pale herb-bed neutrals, and natural stem shadows; do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Chroma-key background: one uniform #ff00ff field with no shadows, gradients, texture, floor plane, watermark, or text.
Avoid: bouquet, vase, hand, insects, landscape, labels, decorative frame, translucent smoke, water droplets.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Dill light-mode design-system board, 16:9, 3840x2160 source image
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn design-system board named "Morphous Dill" using the dill motif shown in this conversation as the visual source.
Motif source: dill herb bed, dill umbel, feathery green fronds, yellow-green seed clusters, airy data system mood.
Palette constraints: use only motif-derived colors: Pale Herbbed #F7F5E8, Dill Ink #243026, Umbel Green #5F7F37, Frond Green #8DBA63, Seed Yellow #D6B94B, Pollen Gold #B98F2B, Stem Sage #C9D6AF, Herb Veil #E6E9D2, Soil Olive #596049, Shadow Leaf #323D2F, Sprout Signal #A8C76B.
Required visible sections with readable labels: palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
UI content: dense but airy data dashboard for herb-bed telemetry: side navigation, top command search, KPI cards, line/bar charts, filter chips, data table, form fields, buttons, badges, alerts, tabs, switch, checkbox, radio, select, textarea, empty/loading/error states.
Design style: professional shadcn/tweakcn board, white-pale herb background, 8px radii, fine dill-frond divider texture, airy spacing, thin sage borders, seed-yellow focus rings, green primary controls, high contrast readable text.
Typography: Inter-style English UI and Japanese Noto Sans JP guidance; include sample Japanese labels such as データ, 検索, 状態, 設定.
Composition: one polished single board, no outer frame, 16:9 landscape, crisp UI mockups, large readable section titles, not a marketing landing page.
Avoid: unrelated purple/blue gradients, saturated non-motif colors, tiny illegible text, stock photo panels, rounded pill-only design, decorative orbs, nested cards, watermark.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Dill dark-mode design-system board, 16:9, 3840x2160 source image
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive dark-mode shadcn/tweakcn design-system board named "Morphous Dill" as a dark translation of the light board and dill motif shown in this conversation.
Motif source: dill herb bed, dill umbel, feathery green fronds, yellow-green seed clusters, airy data system mood.
Palette constraints: use only motif-derived colors: Dill Ink #243026, Shadow Leaf #323D2F, Soil Olive #596049, Umbel Green #5F7F37, Frond Green #8DBA63, Sprout Signal #A8C76B, Seed Yellow #D6B94B, Pollen Gold #B98F2B, Herb Veil #E6E9D2, Pale Herbbed #F7F5E8, Stem Sage #C9D6AF.
Dark mode mapping: deep dill-ink background, shadow-leaf cards, soil-olive sidebars, herb-veil foreground text, frond-green primary controls, seed-yellow focus and warning accents, pale herbbed highlights.
Required visible sections with readable labels: palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
UI content: dense but airy data dashboard for herb-bed telemetry: side navigation, top command search, KPI cards, line/bar charts, filter chips, data table, form fields, buttons, badges, alerts, tabs, switch, checkbox, radio, select, textarea, empty/loading/error states.
Design style: professional shadcn/tweakcn board, 8px radii, fine dill-frond divider texture, luminous seed-yellow focus rings, restrained green controls, high contrast readable text, no generic dark blue or purple.
Typography: Inter-style English UI and Japanese Noto Sans JP guidance; include sample Japanese labels such as データ, 検索, 状態, 設定.
Composition: one polished single board, no outer frame, 16:9 landscape, crisp UI mockups, large readable section titles, not a marketing landing page.
Avoid: unrelated purple/blue gradients, saturated non-motif colors, tiny illegible text, stock photo panels, rounded pill-only design, decorative orbs, nested cards, watermark.
